ModMetaData.name: Pawn Editor Forked
ModMetaData.author: Segas Wolf (Fork of ISOR3X, legodude17, Taranchuk, TreadTheDawnGames, mycroftjr, Inglix, fofajardo)
ModMetaData.description:
Pawn Editor - Community Fork maintained by Segas Wolf.
Stability and compatibility fixes for RimWorld 1.6. Original mod created by ISOR3X / legodude17.
v2.4.1: VAspirE aspiration editing is now properly usable in the pre-colony editor, with searchable selection, preselected current aspirations, and 4-5 aspiration validation.
v2.3.0: Blueprint and Duplication overhaul. All mod data (VPE psycasts, Mechlink, Cyberlink, genes, 35+ mod components) now automatically preserved in blueprints and duplicates.
